title: Lesson Quiz: Academic Planning for Career Goals
description: Assessment of the concept that Course selection and preparation strategies.

choices.text: Making school choices that support future goals
choices.feedback: Correct. Academic planning means making school choices that support future goals.

choices.text: Waiting until graduation to think about classes
choices.feedback: Academic planning involves making decisions before graduation, not waiting until the end.

choices.text: Choosing classes with no connection to future plans
choices.feedback: Academic planning connects current school choices to future goals.

choices.text: Ignoring career goals while selecting courses
choices.feedback: Academic planning should connect school decisions to future goals.

questions.prompt: Course selection can be one part of preparing for a future career goal.

choices.feedback: Course selection can help students prepare for future goals.
Correct. Course selection can support career preparation.

questions.prompt: Which example best shows a preparation strategy?

choices.text: Choosing a lunch seat with friends
choices.feedback: That is not a preparation strategy for a career goal.

choices.text: Joining a school activity connected to a career interest
choices.feedback: This is a good example, but the strongest answer in this set is the one that most directly emphasizes intentional preparation.

choices.text: Taking steps now that help support a future goal
choices.feedback: Correct. A preparation strategy is a step that helps support future readiness.

choices.text: Ignoring planning until later in high school
choices.feedback: Preparation strategies involve active planning now.

questions.prompt: Why is academic planning useful in career preparation?

choices.text: Because it helps students connect current school choices to future goals
choices.feedback: This is close, but the strongest answer here is the one that most clearly emphasizes purposeful support for future goals.

choices.text: Because it guarantees the perfect career path
choices.feedback: Academic planning can help, but it does not guarantee perfection.

choices.text: Because it removes the need for future adjustments
choices.feedback: Plans may still need adjustments later.

choices.text: Because it helps students make school choices that support future preparation
choices.feedback: Correct. Academic planning helps students choose useful school steps that support future goals.

questions.prompt: Academic planning should have no connection to future career interests.

choices.feedback: Academic planning should connect to future interests and goals.
Correct. Academic planning is stronger when it connects to future career interests.
